scripts.db:all: npm run generate:sql-schema && npm run validate:db
scripts.seed:all: npm run generate:seed && npm run validate:seed
scripts.characters:all: npm run generate:seed-characters && npm run validate:characters-rules && npm run seed:characters && npm run validate:characters-db && npm run validate:characters-db-mechanics && npm run audit:characters-dynamic
scripts.mechanics:all: npm run migrate:run && npm run generate:seed-subclass-mechanics && npm run seed:subclass-mechanics
scripts.skills:all: npm run generate:skills && npm run validate:skills
scripts.rules:all: npm run apply:hp && npm run validate:rules
scripts.weapons:all: npm run apply:weapons && npm run validate:weapons
scripts.armor:all: npm run apply:armor && npm run validate:armor
scripts.subclasses:all: npm run apply:subclass-spells && npm run validate:subclasses
scripts.fichas:all: npm run creation:all && npm run rules:all && npm run skills:all && npm run weapons:all && npm run armor:all && npm run subclasses:all && npm run validate:references
scripts.spellcasting:all: npm run generate:spell-lists && npm run apply:progression && npm run validate:spellcasting && npm run check:spellcasting
